title: 2 Pcs Collapsible Fitness Hula Hoops, Colorful Portable Segmented Sports Hula Hoop, Adjustable Hoola Hoops Ring for Dancing, Swimming, Pet Training, Home Exercise
features: Product packaging:You will receive 2 hula hoop,the fitness hula hoops can connect all the 8 sections to create a large hula circle with 60cm inside diameter.

Quality materials: This hula hoop is made of high-quality materials, which is strong and durable, reliable connection, long service life, good product quality, hula hoops is lightweight, smooth without burrs. ﻿

Portable design: Hoola hoop is made of 8 removable. The hula hoop detachable design is easy to carry and store.the hoola hoop has a light and strong buckle design. Therefore, you can quickly install and use hoola hoop anywhere.

Adjustable weight: Hula hoops each section is a hollow tube that can be filled with small objects, the weight of the hula hoop can be modified with the addition of sand or stuffing, making hula hoop more challenging.

Wide range of applications: The detachable hula hoop is suitable for gymnastics, gaming, pet training, and more. Hula hoops can not only be used as toys to play with, but also a good choice for young people to exercise and fitness.
